title: Légy jó mindhalálig
writer: Zsigmond Móricz, Jenõ Szatmári, István Zágon
actors: László Dévényi, Kálmán Rózsahegyi, Gyula Csortos
plot: The story follows the life of a bright and sensitive schoolboy growing up in an old, established boarding school in the city of Debrecen in eastern Hungary.
